main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'aclarado insuficiente glicerina + bisulfito... obstruyendo' matches ambas anchors

key_signals.justification: C2: 9+ signals (glicerina 320, ORP -10, 1x30min vs 3x1h, dP1 1.5, dP2 0.9, caudal 70%)

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts (oxidativo, defecto fabricacion) - falta 'variabilidad normal'

recommended_action.justification: C4: 3 aclarados con permeado low-P sin CIP inicial + ramp 30 min - matches gold

requested_data.justification: C5: 3 anchors (COD rechazo, procedimiento OEM, dosis ajuste)

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: COD<50 + ORP normal pero caudal<85% rechazo<99.2 -> defecto

automatic_fails_triggered.reference: Aplicar CIP ácido/alcalino al elemento nuevo
automatic_fails_triggered.justification: Menciona CIP NaOH 0.1% si tras 3 aclarados COD permanece >50

reviewer_notes: Claude conflict; CIP condicional al final - fail recoverable
